name: Feature request

title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]

---

## Workflow Or Problem

What workflow are you trying to improve?

## Who Needs This?

Is this mainly for a store owner, agency, developer, content team, support team, marketplace operator, or another user type?

## Proposed Behavior

What should Quorlyx do?

## Options Or Integrations

Mention any related WordPress, WooCommerce, CRM, webhook, automation, analytics, or AI provider context.

## Alternatives Considered

What workaround are you using now?

## Contribution

Are you willing to test this, provide screenshots, or open a pull request?
